steps.title: Set up
steps.content: $W(x) = 6x + 75$, where $x$ is the number of plants. The two tasks are watering plants and trimming hedges.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: The term $6x$ grows with the number of plants, so it represents watering. The constant 75 does not change with $x$, so it represents trimming hedges — a fixed-time task regardless of plant count.
